expectations.text: Output contains headers for all 3 agents
expectations.evidence: Recruiter, Editor, Strategist all present with domain headers

expectations.text: Recruiter speaks first or second (domain owner for hiring topics)
expectations.evidence: Recruiter is first speaker — correct domain ordering

expectations.text: Each agent turn is 60 words or fewer
expectations.evidence: Recruiter: 77 words, Editor: 85 words, Strategist: 77 words. All exceed 60-word limit.

expectations.text: Board Recommendation section exists and is 80 words or fewer
Each agent surfaces a realistic risk or counterpoint
expectations.evidence: Recruiter: 'attracting generalists who churn shallow content'; Editor: 'hiring someone whose prose needs heavy editing'; Strategist: 'scope creep from part-time to full-time cost'

expectations.text: After approval section, asks whether to save or keep in chat
expectations.evidence: 'Keep this in the chat only, or save as a board meeting document?'
